shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/search-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n' && pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g '*combobox*' -g '*select*' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "find /home/user/.codex/skills /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache -path '*search-memory/SKILL.md' -print 2>/dev/null | head -20; printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n'; pwd; rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g '*combobox*' -g '*select*' | head -80; printf '\\n--- status ---\\n'; git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/search-memory/SKILL.md; printf '\\n--- targeted memory ---\\n'; nmem --json m search \"Downshift aria-selected useCombobox useSelect boolean string\" --space default --limit 5"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"aria-selected|getItemProps\" src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/useSelect | head -160; printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n'; node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))\"; printf '\\n--- relevant files ---\\n'; rg --files src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/useSelect | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,340p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js; sed -n '400,480p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js; sed -n '1,75p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js; sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js; rg -n \"aria-selected.*boolean|aria-selected\" src | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/distill-memory/SKILL.md; printf '\\n--- status ---\\n'; git status --short; printf '\\n--- diff check ---\\n'; git diff --check"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Downshift getItemProps aria-selected real boolean" --space default --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"Downshift's useCombobox and useSelect getItemProps now return aria-selected as a real boolean comparison result. The prior template literals converted true/false to strings, making both values truthy in JavaScript; rendered DOM aria-selected attributes remain unchanged. Focused and full hook suites pass after updating stale string assertions.\" -t \"Downshift aria-selected prop type fix\" --unit-type learning -l label_downshift -l label_aria -s codex -i 0.7"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
